did_this_paper_use_ai_to_obtain_results_.details: The paper describes a prospective study using reflectance confocal microscopy (RCM) for mapping lentigo maligna/melanoma margins. The methodology involves manual RCM imaging and correlation with histopathology from staged excision. There is no mention of using artificial intelligence, machine learning, deep learning, or computer vision algorithms to obtain the results; the diagnostic accuracy and agreement were calculated based on direct comparison between RCM findings and histopathology.

non_compliance_reason: The paper does not use AI to obtain results in dermatology.
